subject: Statistics
title: Exponential Smoothing
description: A quick win: understand Exponential Smoothing.

hook.text: Give more weight to recent data and less to old data. That's exponential smoothing — and it's surprisingly powerful.

buildup.text: The forecast is a weighted average of past observations. Weights decrease exponentially as data gets older.

discovery.text: A smoothing parameter α controls how fast old data is forgotten. High α reacts quickly. Low α is stable.

twist.text: Simple exponential smoothing has no trend or seasonality. Holt's method adds trend. Holt-Winters adds both.

climax.text: Despite its simplicity, exponential smoothing often beats complex methods in forecasting competitions.

punchline.text: Forget the distant past gradually. Recent data matters most. Simple wins often.

quiz.question: What does the smoothing parameter α control in exponential smoothing?
options: How quickly old observations are forgotten — high α reacts fast, low α is stable
The number of data points used
